nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Sulawesi streaked flycatcher
nodes.summary: Sulawesi streaked flycatcher（Sulawesi streaked flycatcher，学名 Muscicapa sodhii），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Sulawesi streaked flycatcher is considered to be a vulnerable species due to habitat loss caused by deforestation and conversion of forested areas to agriculture

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Sulawesi streaked flycatcher is considered to be a vulnerable species due to habitat loss caused by deforestation and conversion of forested areas to agriculture
